spec_match.rationale: The ::column pseudo-element targets CSS multi-column generated fragments — only containers using `column-count`, `columns`, or `column-width`. This page uses `display: grid; grid-auto-flow: column` and applies `::column` to grid tracks, which is NOT what the pseudo selects. The `::column` rules in the stylesheet have no effect; the visible columns come from grid, not from the pseudo.

interactive.rationale: Four real style-mode buttons that toggle classes on the board, but the visible effect (background colors per column) is delivered by regular grid background, not by the `::column` pseudo. So interaction is real but the feature being demonstrated isn't firing.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb claims `::column styles each grid track` — that's the bug. ::column doesn't target grid tracks. Whole framing is wrong relative to the spec.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't matter — the pseudo isn't firing on this layout. Even if it did, no edge cases are exercised.

references.rationale: Reviewer note: verify references section is present at the bottom of the file (file is long; not fully read). If absent, this becomes a major fail.

design_system.rationale: Uses raw hex colours throughout colored-lanes mode: `#fff7ed`, `#eff6ff`, `#f0fdf4`, `#fdf4ff`, `#fffbeb`, `#d97706`, `#7c3aed`. Per CLAUDE.md rule 5, per-demo styles must use design-system variables. The colored-lanes mode is the headline interaction and it's all raw hex.

openQuestions.title: Rebuild the demo on a real multi-column container, or replace the concept
openQuestions.detail: ::column targets multicol fragments, not grid tracks. The `display: grid; grid-auto-flow: column` setup is the wrong layout. Either rebuild with `columns: 4` so multicol actually creates the four tracks (this changes the model — cards flow column-by-column, not row-by-row), or pick a different concept that's actually a multicol use case. A kanban board may not be a multicol use case at all and may need replacing with newspaper-pagination, paginated-changelog, or print-layout-preview.

openQuestions.title: Replace all raw hex with design-system tokens
openQuestions.detail: Colored-lanes mode uses `#fff7ed`, `#eff6ff`, `#f0fdf4`, `#fdf4ff`. Card-label uses `#7c3aed`. Highlight uses `#fffbeb` and `#d97706`. None are in the design system; per CLAUDE.md rule 5 they must be. Use `color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-blue) 12%, var(--bg-paper))` etc.

openQuestions.title: Verify references section presence
openQuestions.detail: Confirm the chromestatus.com/feature/5192332683771904 link is present in a see-also/references block. If missing, add — required by the slug-recovery script.

openQuestions.title: Replace inline onclick with addEventListener
openQuestions.detail: Style buttons use `onclick="setMode('default')"` inline attribute. Other concepts in this feature use addEventListener — inconsistent style.

summary: Built on a misunderstanding of what ::column selects. The pseudo doesn't target grid tracks; it targets multicol fragments. The demo renders because of the grid layout, but the `::column` rules in the stylesheet have no effect. Combined with extensive raw-hex use, this needs either a rebuild on real multicol or replacement with a different concept entirely.
